title: Extraordinary Caramelized Slovakian Plum Bowl
description: A rich and chewy solo-dinner Slovakian dish featuring oranges, perfect for Ayurvedic sattvic diet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel and chop the plums into bite-sized pieces and place them in the earthenware bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together orange juice, honey, almond oil, cinnamon powder, and cardamom powder.
Pour the mixture over the plums and toss to coat.
Heat coconut oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Pour the hot oil over the plum mixture and toss to coat.
Transfer the bowl to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the plums warm, garnished with additional orange zest if desired.
